name: Chinese Chicken Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast fillets - approximately 4 oz each, skinned and all visible fat removed
1 1/3 cup Homemade Chicken Broth or commercial low-sodium variety
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Cut into 1-inch cubes. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine broth, cornstarch, sherry, soy sauce, and vinegar. Set aside.
3. Heat hot pepper oil in a nonstick skillet or wok over high heat. Add ginger and garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and stir-fry until lightly browned. Transfer chicken to a plate and set aside.
5. Add sesame oil to the skillet. Stir in mushrooms and pepper. Cover the pan, reduce heat, and steam for 5-7 minutes.
6. Return the chicken broth mixture to the skillet. Return the chicken to the pan and cook until the sauce is thickened.
7. Add onions and pecans and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Serve over rice if desired.
